description: Generated Inventory Report script — runs scans, outputs markdown, committed before each build

inventory-script.evidence: scripts/generate-inventory.mjs created. Outputs docs/inventory/SOCELLE_GLOBAL_INVENTORY_REPORT.md + docs/qa/inventory_report.json. npm run inventory wired. Pure Node.js (no shell commands). Metrics: 267 pages, 173 shells (64.8% by simple query detection), 0 banned terms.
